---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with ArchePy
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

A short, top-level summary (1-2 sentences).

## Reproduction

A minimal, self-contained code snippet that triggers the bug:

```python
import archepy
# ...
```

If the bug requires specific data, please describe its shape (e.g., `X.shape == (200, 1000)`) and how it was generated.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happens. Include the full traceback if there is one.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- ArchePy version: (`python -c "import archepy; print(archepy.__version__)"`)
- NumPy version:
- CuPy / CUDA version (if using GPU):

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant.
